source: CDISC SDTM Implementation Guide 3.4, hand-curated from public specification

rules.description: DM (Demographics) domain is required in every SDTM submission.

params.message: DM domain must be present in every SDTM submission.

rules.description: STUDYID must not be null in any domain.

params.message: STUDYID must not be null.

rules.description: DOMAIN must not be null in any SDTM dataset.

params.message: DOMAIN must not be null.

rules.description: USUBJID must not be null in any SDTM dataset.

params.message: USUBJID must not be null.

rules.description: STUDYID must be consistent (same value) across all records in a dataset.

params.message: STUDYID must be the same value across all records.

rules.description: DOMAIN must be consistent (same value) across all records in a dataset.

params.message: DOMAIN must be the same value across all records.

rules.description: SEX in DM must use values from the CDISC controlled terminology codelist SEX.

params.message: SEX value is not in the SEX codelist.

rules.description: RACE in DM must use values from the CDISC controlled terminology codelist RACE.

params.message: RACE value is not in the RACE codelist.

rules.description: COUNTRY in DM must use ISO 3166 alpha-3 country codes (CDISC COUNTRY codelist).

params.message: COUNTRY value is not in the COUNTRY codelist (ISO 3166 alpha-3).

rules.description: DMDTC in DM must be in ISO 8601 extended datetime format.

params.message: DMDTC does not conform to ISO 8601 extended datetime format.

rules.description: RFSTDTC in DM must be in ISO 8601 extended datetime format when present.

params.message: RFSTDTC does not conform to ISO 8601 extended datetime format.

rules.description: RFENDTC in DM must be in ISO 8601 extended datetime format when present.

params.message: RFENDTC does not conform to ISO 8601 extended datetime format.

rules.description: DTHDTC in DM must be in ISO 8601 extended datetime format when present.

params.message: DTHDTC does not conform to ISO 8601 extended datetime format.

rules.description: DTHFL in DM must use values from the NY codelist (Y or null).

params.message: DTHFL value must be 'Y' or null (NY codelist).

rules.description: SUBJID must not be null in DM.

params.message: SUBJID must not be null in DM.

rules.description: AETERM must not be null in AE.

params.message: AETERM (Reported Term for the Adverse Event) must not be null in AE.

rules.description: AEDECOD must not be null in AE.

params.message: AEDECOD (Dictionary-Derived Term) must not be null in AE.

rules.description: AESTDTC in AE must be in ISO 8601 extended datetime format when present.

params.message: AESTDTC does not conform to ISO 8601 extended datetime format.

rules.description: AEENDTC in AE must be in ISO 8601 extended datetime format when present.

params.message: AEENDTC does not conform to ISO 8601 extended datetime format.

rules.description: AESER in AE must use values from the NY codelist when present.

params.message: AESER value must be in the NY codelist (Y/N).

rules.description: AEOUT in AE must use values from the AEOUT codelist when present.

params.message: AEOUT value is not in the AEOUT codelist.

rules.description: LBDTC in LB must be in ISO 8601 extended datetime format when present.

params.message: LBDTC does not conform to ISO 8601 extended datetime format.

rules.description: LBTEST must not be null in LB.

params.message: LBTEST (Lab Test Name) must not be null in LB.

rules.description: LBTESTCD must not be null in LB.

params.message: LBTESTCD (Lab Test Short Name) must not be null in LB.

rules.description: VSTEST must not be null in VS.

params.message: VSTEST (Vital Signs Test Name) must not be null in VS.

rules.description: VSDTC in VS must be in ISO 8601 extended datetime format when present.

params.message: VSDTC does not conform to ISO 8601 extended datetime format.

rules.description: USUBJID must be present in every SDTM domain.

params.message: USUBJID column is required in all SDTM domains.

rules.description: STUDYID must be present in every SDTM domain.

params.message: STUDYID column is required in all SDTM domains.

rules.description: DOMAIN must be present in every SDTM domain.

params.message: DOMAIN column is required in all SDTM domains.

rules.description: ETHNIC in DM must use values from the ETHNIC codelist when present.

params.message: ETHNIC value is not in the ETHNIC codelist.

rules.description: DM domain must contain all required Identifier and Topic variables.

params.message: DM domain is missing one or more required Identifier variables (STUDYID, DOMAIN, USUBJID, SUBJID).

rules.description: DM domain must contain required demographic variables (SEX, RACE, ETHNIC, COUNTRY).

params.message: DM domain is missing one or more required demographic variables (SEX, RACE, ETHNIC, COUNTRY).

rules.description: DM domain must contain RFSTDTC and RFENDTC (reference start/end dates).

params.message: DM domain must include RFSTDTC (Subject Reference Start Date/Time) and RFENDTC (Subject Reference End Date/Time).

rules.description: DM domain must contain SITEID, AGE, and AGEU.

params.message: DM domain must include SITEID, AGE, and AGEU.

rules.description: DM domain must contain treatment arm variables (ARMCD, ARM, ACTARMCD, ACTARM).

params.message: DM domain must include treatment arm variables: ARMCD, ARM, ACTARMCD, ACTARM.

rules.description: AE domain must contain required Identifier and sequence variables.

params.message: AE domain is missing required variables (STUDYID, DOMAIN, USUBJID, AESEQ).

rules.description: AE domain must contain the AE term and dictionary-derived variables.

params.message: AE domain must include AETERM, AEDECOD (MedDRA preferred term), and AEBODSYS (body system).

rules.description: AE domain must contain severity, seriousness, and outcome variables.

params.message: AE domain must include AESEV (severity), AESER (serious flag), and AEOUT (outcome).

rules.description: VS domain must contain required Identifier and test variables.

params.message: VS domain is missing required variables (STUDYID, DOMAIN, USUBJID, VSSEQ, VSTESTCD, VSTEST).

rules.description: VS domain must contain result variables (VSORRES, VSORRESU, VSSTRESC, VSSTRESN, VSSTRESU).

params.message: VS domain must include original result (VSORRES/VSORRESU) and standardized result (VSSTRESC/VSSTRESN/VSSTRESU) variables.

rules.description: LB domain must contain required Identifier and test variables.

params.message: LB domain is missing required variables (STUDYID, DOMAIN, USUBJID, LBSEQ, LBTESTCD, LBTEST).

rules.description: LB domain must contain result variables (LBORRES, LBORRESU, LBSTRESC, LBSTRESN, LBSTRESU).

params.message: LB domain must include result variables (LBORRES/LBORRESU and LBSTRESC/LBSTRESN/LBSTRESU).

rules.description: EG domain must contain required Identifier and test variables.

params.message: EG domain is missing required variables (STUDYID, DOMAIN, USUBJID, EGSEQ, EGTESTCD, EGTEST).

rules.description: In any domain, STUDYID must appear before DOMAIN, which must appear before USUBJID.

params.message: Identifier variables must appear in order: STUDYID, DOMAIN, USUBJID.

rules.description: In findings domains (VS, LB, EG), the sequence variable (xSEQ) must appear after USUBJID.

params.message: VS: VSSEQ must appear after USUBJID in the column order.

rules.description: In DM, AGE must be a numeric variable.

params.message: DM.AGE must be a numeric variable.

rules.description: In VS, VSSTRESN must be a numeric variable.

params.message: VS.VSSTRESN must be a numeric variable.

rules.description: In LB, LBSTRESN must be a numeric variable.

params.message: LB.LBSTRESN must be a numeric variable.

rules.description: Variable labels in the submission must match the labels specified in Define-XML.

params.message: Variable label does not match Define-XML specification.

rules.description: Variable data types in the submission must match the types declared in Define-XML.

params.message: Variable data type does not match Define-XML specification.

rules.description: Each variable in the DM dataset must be declared in Define-XML.

params.message: One or more DM variables are not declared in Define-XML.

rules.description: Each variable in the AE dataset must be declared in Define-XML.

params.message: One or more AE variables are not declared in Define-XML.

rules.description: Variables declared Mandatory in Define-XML must not contain null values in DM.

params.message: A mandatory variable (Mandatory=Yes in Define-XML) contains a null value.

rules.description: Variables declared Mandatory in Define-XML must not contain null values in AE.

params.message: A mandatory AE variable (Mandatory=Yes in Define-XML) contains a null value.

rules.description: Variable data types in DM must match the types declared in Define-XML.

params.message: A variable's data type does not match the type declared in Define-XML.

rules.description: SEX values in DM must be from the codelist declared in Define-XML.

params.message: DM.SEX contains a value not in the Define-XML declared codelist.

rules.description: RACE values in DM must be from the codelist declared in Define-XML.

params.message: DM.RACE contains a value not in the Define-XML declared codelist.

rules.description: ETHNIC values in DM must be from the codelist declared in Define-XML.

params.message: DM.ETHNIC contains a value not in the Define-XML declared codelist.

rules.description: AESEV values in AE must be from the codelist declared in Define-XML.

params.message: AE.AESEV contains a value not in the Define-XML declared codelist.

rules.description: AEOUT values in AE must be from the codelist declared in Define-XML.

params.message: AE.AEOUT contains a value not in the Define-XML declared codelist.

rules.description: AGEU in DM must use AGEU codelist when present.

params.message: AGEU value is not in the AGEU codelist.

rules.description: BRTHDTC in DM must conform to ISO 8601 when present.

params.message: BRTHDTC does not conform to ISO 8601 extended datetime format.
